summary: Tested shared AppHeader component across all super admin pages. All tests passed: Dashboard, Projects, Accounts Board, Marketing Board, Settings, GM Dashboard. Verified main nav highlighting, sub-menus display correctly, logo click navigates to dashboard, and logout works.

features_tested.feature: AppHeader renders on Dashboard with correct nav items
features_tested.notes: header-brand, header-nav, 8 nav items, header-notifications, header-username, header-logout all found

features_tested.feature: My Dashboard nav item highlighted on /dashboard
features_tested.notes: bg-amber-50 class applied to active nav item
Dashboard has no sub-menu defined, sub-nav correctly not rendered
All Projects nav highlighted, header persists

features_tested.feature: AppHeader renders on Accounts Board with sub-menu
features_tested.notes: Sub-nav shows: Accounts Board, Accountant Module, Cheque Management, Payment Processing, Indirect Costs, Suspense Account, HR Portal, Income, Expenses

features_tested.feature: AppHeader renders on Marketing Board with sub-menu
features_tested.notes: Sub-nav shows: Marketing Board, CRE Board, Pre-Sales CRM, Sales CRM, RE Projects, Custom Fields, CSV Import

features_tested.feature: AppHeader renders on Settings with sub-menu
features_tested.notes: Sub-nav shows: Settings, Materials, Vendors (subnav-settings, subnav-materials, subnav-vendors all found)

features_tested.feature: AppHeader renders on GM Dashboard with sub-menu
features_tested.notes: Sub-nav shows: GM Command Center, PM Dashboard, Approvals, Financial Overview, Procurement, Work Orders
Clicking nav items navigates to correct pages
Clicking Settings > Materials navigates to /materials, Vendors to /vendor-management
Clicking header-brand from Marketing Board returns to /dashboard

critical_code_review_comments: AppHeader component correctly uses useLocation to detect current path
SUB_MENUS configuration properly maps module paths to their sub-items
getModuleKey function correctly handles both exact and prefix path matching
Sub-nav only renders when subItems.length > 1 (correct behavior)
All data-testid attributes properly set for testing

test_credentials.demo_login: admin@constructionos.com via Demo Access > Super Admin

context_for_next_testing_agent: AppHeader component is fully functional across all pages. Demo login works via Demo Access tab > Super Admin quick access button. All nav items and sub-nav items have data-testid attributes for testing. Pages may take 2-5 seconds to load data after navigation.
